_readme: Composition record for a VIRTUAL target (no lights dir of its own): the members are sibling per-filter sets, each stacked by the ordinary mono path; compose.py aligns them to the reference member and composes (contract: datasets/README.md).

notes.palette: SHO (Hubble): SII->R, Ha->G, OIII->B — the channel assignment is objective; palette aesthetics (rmgreen etc.) are render-side and need the user's eyes
notes.reference: Ha is the deepest member (19x600 s vs 500/400 s) and the structural anchor; as reference it carries only the identity transform (never interpolated)
